member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext
member.summary: The single EF Core for the FSBS application. All tables live in the fsbs PostgreSQL schema; snake_case column naming is applied globally via UseSnakeCaseNamingConvention().

remarks.para: Construction: registered as a scoped service via . The primary constructor receives from DI — this is captured as a field and referenced inside the global query filter lambdas, meaning the tenant/soft-delete predicates are re-evaluated per request, not compiled once at startup.
Audit stamping: (registered as a singleton and attached via AddInterceptors) stamps CreatedAt, CreatedBy, UpdatedAt, and UpdatedBy on every before SaveChanges completes.
Optimistic concurrency: every table exposes the PostgreSQL xmin system column as a concurrency token, configured in each entity's IEntityTypeConfiguration.

Migrations: the migration assembly is FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Migrations. Never run dotnet ef database update against production manually — migrations are applied exclusively through the CI/CD pipeline.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext},FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUser)
member.summary: The single EF Core for the FSBS application. All tables live in the fsbs PostgreSQL schema; snake_case column naming is applied globally via UseSnakeCaseNamingConvention().

remarks.para: Construction: registered as a scoped service via . The primary constructor receives from DI — this is captured as a field and referenced inside the global query filter lambdas, meaning the tenant/soft-delete predicates are re-evaluated per request, not compiled once at startup.
Audit stamping: (registered as a singleton and attached via AddInterceptors) stamps CreatedAt, CreatedBy, UpdatedAt, and UpdatedBy on every before SaveChanges completes.
Optimistic concurrency: every table exposes the PostgreSQL xmin system column as a concurrency token, configured in each entity's IEntityTypeConfiguration.

Migrations: the migration assembly is FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Migrations. Never run dotnet ef database update against production manually — migrations are applied exclusively through the CI/CD pipeline.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.AppUsers
member.summary: All registered users across both Cognito pools (staff and customers). Filtered by and soft-delete at query time. Use IgnoreQueryFilters() when an admin operation must cross tenant boundaries.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.UserProfiles
member.summary: Personal details for users. Shares the primary key column (user_id) with app_users — always accessed via .

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Qualifications
member.summary: Flight and cabin-crew qualifications used as reference data for instructor records.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Organisations
member.summary: Corporate customer organisations. Filtered by so each organisation's data is invisible to other tenants.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.OrgMemberships
member.summary: Links between users and the organisations they belong to, with their intra-org role.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.OrgAccounts
member.summary: Financial accounts for organisations. CurrentBalanceGbp on these rows is maintained by a PostgreSQL trigger — never written by EF Core directly.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.AccountPayments
member.summary: Payments posted against organisation accounts. Only Verified payments affect the running balance; Pending payments are held for Management approval.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.AccountStatements
member.summary: Point-in-time JSON snapshots of an organisation's account statement. Immutable once created.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Invitations
member.summary: Invitation records for corporate customer registration. The raw token is never stored — only the SHA-256 hash in token_hash.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.SimulatorUnits
member.summary: Physical simulator devices, each with a current active configuration and one or more bays.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.SimulatorConfigurations
member.summary: Aircraft-type and cabin-layout setups for a simulator unit. Drives pricing tier selection and enforces FlightDeck (max 4) and CabinCrew (max 10) capacity hard caps.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.SimulatorBays
member.summary: Individual bookable bays within a simulator unit. The unique index on (bay_id, start_at, end_at) filtered to non-cancelled slots prevents double-booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.MaintenanceWindows
member.summary: Scheduled maintenance periods that block bay availability on the calendar.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.ReconfigurationTemplates
member.summary: Turnaround durations for switching between configuration pairs. When no template exists for a pair the unit's DefaultReconfigMins is used as fallback.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.ScheduleTemplates
member.summary: Reusable scheduling blueprints associated with a specific simulator configuration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.PricingPolicies
member.summary: Base hourly rates per (configuration, training type, customer class, effective date). The most recently effective policy matching the booking's key tuple is selected at confirmation time and the price is then locked permanently.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.DiscountRules
member.summary: Threshold-based discount rules attached to a pricing policy. Evaluated at booking confirmation and snapshotted as . Never applied to InternalStudent bookings.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Courses
member.summary: Structured training programmes. Tenant-scoped; filtered by at query time.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Modules
member.summary: Logical chapters within a course, ordered by sequence_order.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Lessons
member.summary: Individual deliverable sessions within a module.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Enrolments
member.summary: Student enrolments on a course. A unique constraint on (user_id, course_id) prevents duplicate active enrolments.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.ProgressRecords
member.summary: Instructor or CourseDirector sign-offs confirming a student completed a lesson.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Instructors
member.summary: Staff members authorised to deliver sessions. Assignment to a booking slot requires the instructor's training_type_ratings array to contain the booking's training type.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.InstructorAvailabilities
member.summary: Declared availability and leave windows used to filter eligible instructors during scheduling.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Bookings
member.summary: The central aggregate. Owns slots, approval, notes, and discount snapshots. InternalStudent bookings enter PendingApproval; all others enter Provisional. The idempotency_key unique index allows safe client retries on POST /bookings.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.BookingSlots
member.summary: Time blocks reserved in a simulator bay. Minimum duration of 240 minutes enforced by CHECK constraint. Filtered unique index prevents double-booking across non-cancelled slots.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.ReconfigurationSlots
member.summary: Non-billable turnaround windows inserted automatically at booking confirmation when adjacent bookings require different simulator configurations. Rendered as grey-hatched on the availability calendar; not selectable by users.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.BookingApprovals
member.summary: Approval records for InternalStudent bookings. A CHECK constraint at the database level enforces that the reviewer cannot be the same user as the requester.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.BookingNotes
member.summary: Internal staff notes on a booking. Not visible to customers.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.BookingDiscounts
member.summary: Immutable snapshots of discount rules applied at booking confirmation. No updated_at or is_deleted columns exist on this table — EF Core is configured to never update these rows after the initial insert.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Invoices
member.summary: Billing documents raised against organisations. Only Issued and Overdue invoices contribute to OrgAccount.current_balance_gbp (maintained by a PostgreSQL trigger). Row-level security restricts visibility to the owning tenant.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.PaymentAllocations
P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.Reports
member.summary: Named report definitions whose query and format are stored as jsonb.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.ReportRuns
member.summary: Asynchronous execution instances of a report. Processed by the reporting worker ECS task; output is written to the fsbs-documents S3 bucket and served only via pre-signed URLs.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.OnModelCreating(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.remarks:
Applies three layers of configuration in order:
HasDefaultSchema("fsbs") — all tables land in the fsbs schema, never public.
ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly — discovers every IEntityTypeConfiguration<T> in the FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Entities assembly. The anchor type is used solely to identify that assembly; it has no special significance beyond that.
— registers per-request soft-delete and tenant-isolation predicates.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.FsbsDbContext.ApplyGlobalQueryFilters(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Registers EF Core global query filters for soft-delete and multi-tenancy.

remarks.para: Tenant filters (, , ): combine the soft-delete predicate with e.TenantId == currentUser.TenantId. The currentUser reference is captured from the constructor parameter — EF evaluates the lambda on each query execution, picking up the tenant ID from the current HTTP request's JWT rather than from a value fixed at context creation time. Staff users always carry the school's root tenant ID, so they see all data across every organisation without additional configuration.
Soft-delete only filters: applied to the remaining entities that are not tenant-scoped. Logically deleted rows are hidden from all standard queries.

No filter: entities that are neither soft-deletable nor tenant-scoped (, , , , , , , ) are omitted from this method intentionally — access to those rows is already constrained by the FK relationships traversed to reach them.
To bypass all filters within a query (e.g. admin purge jobs, the nightly reconciliation Lambda), call .IgnoreQueryFilters() on the IQueryable.

member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Interceptors.TenantCommandInterceptor
member.summary: EF Core that sets the PostgreSQL session-level variable app.current_tenant_id immediately after each connection is opened, so that the row-level security (RLS) policies on tenant-scoped tables (bookings, enrolments, courses, organisations, invitations, invoices) are enforced.
member.remarks: Running SET app.current_tenant_id on connection open means the value is in place before any query executes. Staff users always carry the school's root tenant GUID. When is (unauthenticated requests) the variable is set to a zero UUID which will not match any tenant row — safe-by-default behaviour.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Interceptors.TenantCommandInterceptor.#ctor(FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUser)
member.summary: EF Core that sets the PostgreSQL session-level variable app.current_tenant_id immediately after each connection is opened, so that the row-level security (RLS) policies on tenant-scoped tables (bookings, enrolments, courses, organisations, invitations, invoices) are enforced.
member.remarks: Running SET app.current_tenant_id on connection open means the value is in place before any query executes. Staff users always carry the school's root tenant GUID. When is (unauthenticated requests) the variable is set to a zero UUID which will not match any tenant row — safe-by-default behaviour.
